title: Night and Fog
tmdbOverview: Filmmaker Alain Resnais documents the atrocities behind the walls of Hitler's concentration camps.
synopsis: Night and Fog (1956) is a documentary and history film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.6 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
